# EAWiFiUnconfiguredAccessoryConfigurationStatus.success

**Case**

The configuration of the accessory succeeded.

## Declaration

```swift
case success
```

## Status Values

- **EAWiFiUnconfiguredAccessoryConfigurationStatus.userCancelledConfiguration**: The user cancelled the configuration process.
- **EAWiFiUnconfiguredAccessoryConfigurationStatus.failed**: The configuration failed.
